title: Template literal with regex metacharacters in literal segments
description: mion templateLiteral.spec.ts 'regex special chars in literal' — parens (and other regex metacharacters) in the literal segments must be escaped in the compiled regex.
notes: Regex metacharacters in literal segments are escaped, so the parens are matched literally — `(42)` passes but `42` (no parens) fails.
